name: Golem Sliver
explicitMods: 4% chance to receive additional Abyss items when opening a Reward Chest in a Heist
2% chance to receive additional Gem items when opening a Reward Chest in a Heist
25% chance in Heists for Chromatic Orbs to drop as Orbs of Fusing instead
3% chance in Heists for Orbs of Transmutation to drop as Chaos Orbs instead
